text:
A supporter records Kenyan Sprinter Zablon Ekwam in his Training at Kasarani Stadium in preparation for its pathway toward the Paris 2024 Olympic Games. July 1, 2024.[Jonah Onyango, Standard]

Men's 400m national champion Zablon Ekwam feels honoured to be among the hundreds of athletes who will grace the Paris 2024 Olympics in France later this month.Get Full Access for Ksh299/WeekUncover the stories others won’t tell. title: National champion Ekwam says he is not under pressure as he heads to Paris Olympics
author: Ochieng Oyugi
description: The 26-year-old will be making his debut at the Olympic Games which start on July 26.
keywords: ["Zablon Ekwam","400m national champion","Kip Keino Classic","2024 Paris Olympics"]
